base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sword_slash_gold — a effect_layer from 1986 dragon quest. highest-tier weapon strike. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame gold sword slash — highest-tier weapon strike
